data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Time tracking by project phase and deliverable', but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions time tracking, but it does not explicitly confirm that the tracking is categorized by project phase and deliverable, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to satisfy this requirement.
gaps: Time tracking by project phase and deliverable is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
